title: Restrict people column notifications, but not automation notifications
excerpt:
I have a board where people are assigned for different reasons 

the person submitting the question
the person picking the question up

I don’t want notifications to go out in either of these cases when someone is assign…

posts.author: beck_rowaichi (Beck Rowaichi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board where people are assigned for different reasons

  1. the person submitting the question
  2. the person picking the question up

I don’t want notifications to go out in either of these cases when someone is assigned.

I can turn this off on a board level for every one which is great.

HOWEVER. I do then want to set an automation so someone will receive an email notification with prescribed text. I can set this up, but because i’ve turned off the board notifications to stop people receiving notifications for column assignment, this in turn means they don’t receive the automation notifications either.

Is there a way to separate out the column notifications from the automation notifications.

thanks

posts.author: ckornaros (Christos Kornaros)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree with you ! Board notifications configuration shouldn’t stop the notification that are configure by automation.
In my case a lot of users muted notifications to keep only the notifications with “mentions” and they didnt’ receive the notification from the automations despite the notification is specific to them. That’s really a pain. Automation notifications must be improve !

posts.author: Lucas1 (Lucas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yea I would like the same. At the moment I use a status column with names for this reason… and I read here others use the drop down column, but you need to create those and modify them everytime you want to remove/add a member. The people column is much better suited to select names, that is IF you could turn off the assignments/notifications…

This also would be very handy with my feature proposal. Maybe you can drop a vote if you like the idea: Automation: Assign whoever is in this column to that column - Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.author: ADee (Andrea Dee)
posts.cookedHtml: I am very interested in this issue, I have the same request! I would love to know if there is a way to separate standard email notifications and custom automated email notifications.

posts.author: benmahlermining (Ben Mahler)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also would like to see some more control in notifications from the board creator’s perspective.

We also use separate people columns for the person assigned a task, the person who the tasks serves, and people who need notifications for the task.

posts.author: khickson (Karen Hickson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same, I have a high volume board that would send dozens of ‘assign’ notifications at a time so I have the option of a status column with a yes/no selection that item creators can set to Yes if they want to be notified. I then have an automation to notify them when the Yes condition is met. But because I’ve muted all notification to avoid spamming them with assign notifications, they also don’t get the automation notification.
If anyone has a workaround I’d be happy to hear it.
